one_time_description: Insurance proceeds received during the year
economic_notes: Nation holds 49.995% interest in Innu Development Limited Partnership, 99.99% in Mushuau Camp and Catering Limited Partnership, and 100% of Mushuau Innu Camp and Catering Inc. Impairment provision of $495,449 recorded against Natuashish Shipping Limited Partnership investment. Portfolio investments in GICs at 4.60% per annum maturing March 2024.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023. Nation is in Newfoundland and Labrador. Consolidated entities include Mushuau Innu First Nation Operations Fund, Community Trust, First Nation Trust, Mushuau EPH and Group Home Inc., Natuashish Shipping Limited Partnership, and Natuashish Shipping GP Inc. Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Impairment of $495,449 on Natuashish Shipping LP investment. Insurance proceeds of $307,500 treated as one-time item. Portfolio investments of $17,169,585 in GICs purchased during the year. Large increase in deferred revenue balance from $15,570,607 to $20,422,085. ISC funding per confirmation was $41,127,936 vs $36,663,646 per financial statements due to timing of deferred amounts. No schedule of remuneration included in the document. Current liabilities estimated as accounts payable $5,443,147 plus due to governments $2,823,222. Cash decreased significantly from $32,746,055 to $12,187,749 primarily due to purchase of portfolio investments.
